Troubleshooting

Logs Reference

What to checkCommand
Server logs (live)docker compose logs server -f
Server last 50 linesdocker compose logs server --tail 50
Postgres logsdocker compose logs db --tail 50
All servicesdocker compose logs -f
Container statusdocker compose ps
